headline: MIDD Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Food Processing Strength
summary: Middleby beats Q1 estimates as Food Processing backlog hit a record $416M, while higher guidance and portfolio changes boosted outlook.

raw.headline: MIDD Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Food Processing Strength
raw.summary: Middleby beats Q1 estimates as Food Processing backlog hit a record $416M, while higher guidance and portfolio changes boosted outlook.

headline: What to Note Ahead of Plug Power's Q1 Earnings Release?
summary: PLUG heads into Q1 results with growth in services and hydrogen revenues, but rising costs and forex headwinds may pressure margins.

raw.headline: What to Note Ahead of Plug Power's Q1 Earnings Release?
raw.summary: PLUG heads into Q1 results with growth in services and hydrogen revenues, but rising costs and forex headwinds may pressure margins.
